title: No Trim Crafting
description: Simple datapack which utilises recipes to disable armour trim crafting
body:
Ever thought that finding armor trims made you feel hollow?
Has it ever annoyed you that you can just duplicate the trims you spent so long finding?
Has your friend ever beaten you up over the fact that they know you have that template in your enderchest that they can just duplicate?

Well I have the solution with this datapack:

**It is quite simple. It just disables the ability to craft the trims!**

If you want to ask me to make another version for a different version or smth then message me on discord @samadc

_FYI: Does not need unzipping when put in the datapack folder_
